scripts.build: pnpm build:packages && pnpm --filter web build && pnpm --filter desktop build
scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @aios/knowledge-graph build && pnpm --filter @aios/self-evolution build && pnpm --filter @aios/ai-core build && pnpm --filter @aios/mcp-adapters build && pnpm --filter @aios/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @aios/core build
scripts.train:clol:1000: pnpm build:packages && node scripts/learning-baseline-capture.js && node scripts/train-operational-1000.js
scripts.train:clol:500: pnpm build:packages && SKIP_PROBE=1 SKIP_HF=1 CLOL_ITERATIONS=500 node scripts/train-multi-pipeline.js
scripts.train:hf:tier-c: pnpm build:packages && HF_ITER_DELAY_MS=2500 SKIP_CAMPAIGNS=tier-a,tier-b,rotation node scripts/hf-train-multi.js
